\textbf{ArbitrIA --- Legal RAG System \enspace\href{\detokenize{https://github.com/ArbitrIA}}{[GitHub]}} \hfill \textit{LlamaIndex, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Domain-specific RAG for Peruvian arbitration documents with document-level and chunk-level indexing
  \item Ingestion service handling variable PDF structures: multi-column layouts, embedded tables, inconsistent headers
  \item Conversational interface maintaining query context across turns, resolving ambiguous references
\end{itemize}

  \item End-to-end pipeline: camera capture, HTTP, Flask API, inference, adaptive response (<120ms)
  \item 150+ Optuna trials with multi-objective search (accuracy vs. latency); 91\% detection in FabLab validation
